name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, turn, flag, nextTurn
N == 3  \* Number of processes

(* State definitions *)
idle == 0
trying == 1
critical == 2

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {idle, trying, critical}]
          /\ turn \in 1..N
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ nextTurn \in [1..N -> 1..N]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> idle]
        /\ turn = 1
        /\ flag = [p \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ nextTurn = [p \in 1..N |-> p]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ /\ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = idle
                        /\ flag[p] = FALSE
                        /\ nextTurn[p] = p
                        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = trying]
                        /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
                        /\ nextTurn' = nextTurn
                        /\ turn' = turn
        \/ /\ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = trying
                        /\ flag[p] = TRUE
                        /\ nextTurn[p] = p
                        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = critical]
                        /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![p] = FALSE]
                        /\ nextTurn' = nextTurn
                        /\ turn' = turn
        \/ /\ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = critical
                        /\ flag[p] = FALSE
                        /\ nextTurn[p] = p
                        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = idle]
                        /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![p] = FALSE]
                        /\ nextTurn' = [nextTurn EXCEPT ![p] = nextTurn[p] + 1]
                        /\ turn' = nextTurn[p] + 1
        \/ /\ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = idle
                        /\ flag[p] = FALSE
                        /\ nextTurn[p] = p
                        /\ state' = state
                        /\ flag' = flag
                        /\ nextTurn' = nextTurn
                        /\ turn' = turn

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn, flag, nextTurn>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next state *)
Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "thinking" /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
      \/ (* Philosopher i starts eating if both forks are free *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                states[i] = "hungry" /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 0 /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = 0
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = i, ![RIGHT(i)] = i]
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
      \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                states[i] = "eating" /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = i /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = i
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = 0, ![RIGHT(i)] = 0]
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Invariant: forks are either free (0) or held by a philosopher *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = <<>>
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = <<>>
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====
